title: [The immunochemical mechanisms of body adaptation to a chemical environment].
author_string: Kovalev, I E, Shipulina, N V
journal_full: Izvestiia Akademii nauk SSSR. Seriia biologicheskaia
abstract: For the first time the dynamics of metabolic and immune responses to xenobiotics were analyzed in their long-term effect on the organism. It was shown that the organism gradually lost the capacity to respond to xenobiotics with the induction of hepatic cytochrome P450 and immune response. Possible mechanisms of this phenomenon are under consideration.
